description: Style Note For those who love outdoor adventures , this bag from wildcraft is just what you need to well be prepared. A practical bag with lots of support, ample space and easy to carry, this one from Wildcraft is a must have for trips trekking, climbing or other adventurous activities. Product Details Orange, grey and black backpack with branding on the top of the covering flap Two adjustable, heavily padded shoulder straps with connecting strap with a click clock closure, a padded strap for added support around your waist with click clock closure, haul loops at the bottom One main compartment with toggle strap closure and an internal pocket with a flap closure with removable metal insert for better support, flap with click clock closure, an internal zippered pocket and adjustable straps on top to cover the main compartment opening Two zippered compartments on the sides and one zippered compartment near the base in front One zippered compartment at the bottom to store the attached and elasticated rain cover for the bag to protect your belongings Adjustable straps with click clock closures around the sides and bottom Adjustable strap around the sides near the bottom Padded back and firm support at the back for support for heavy load Material and Care Synthetic Machine wash only Do not bleach, iron or tumble dry Size Height: 74 cm Width: 38 cmWarranty: 5 years
